name: linear
description: Linear issue management via linearis CLI — create, update, close, resolve, and plan issues with team inference, TDD-driven resolution, CI monitoring, and PR review handling. Bundles 12 workflow playbooks (CreateIssue, UpdateIssue, CloseIssue, ListIssues, ResolveIssue, PlanProject, CreateProject, ShipDaily, ManageInitiatives, ManageMilestones, MonitorCI, ReviewPR) plus a reusable GraphQL helper script.
